popularStory.headline: Thomas Dimock
popularStory.description:
The Dimock Family, one of the most ancient of Great Britain, claims as its remote progenitors-- Tudor Trevor, Lord of Herford and Whittington in Salof.  Founder of the Tribe of the Marches.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Rev. Thomas Dimmock於1604年10月7日出生在英國素福爾可時，他的父親Edward Humphrey Dimmock17歲，母親Margaret Endersby15歲。他於1638年與Ann在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯希圖阿潔且於1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波。他去世於1658年6月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年53歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rev. Thomas Dimmock于1604年10月7日出生在英国素福爾可时，他的父亲Edward Humphrey Dimmock17岁，母亲Margaret Endersby15岁。他于1638年与Ann在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1639年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯希圖阿潔且于1640年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波。他去世于1658年6月4日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年53岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Dimmock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

variants.name: Dimock
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire, named perhaps from a British word akin to Welsh tymoch ‘pigsty’, but more probably from a Celtic din ‘fort’ + moch ‘swine’. A family of the name Dymoke held the hereditary position of King's Champion for thirty-four generations, starting in the late 14th century when John Dymoke adopted the role following his marriage to Margaret de Ludlow.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Rev. Thomas Dimmock was born on 7 October 1604, in Suffolk, England, his father, Edward Humphrey Dimmock, was 17 and his mother, Margaret Endersby, was 15. He married Ann in 1638, in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1639 and Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1640. He died on 4 June 1658, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 53, and was buried in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rev. Thomas Dimmock est né le 7 octobre 1604, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Edward Humphrey Dimmock, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Margaret Endersby, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Ann en 1638, à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1639 et à Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1640. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1658, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rev. Thomas Dimmock am 7. Oktober 1604 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward Humphrey Dimmock 17 und seine Mutter Margaret Endersby 15. Er hat 1638 in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Ann geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1639 hat er in Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1640 in Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 4. Juni 1658 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rev. Thomas Dimmock è nato il il 7 ottobre 1604 nel Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Edward Humphrey Dimmock, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Endersby, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Ann nel 1638, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1639 e nel Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1640. Morì il 4 giugno 1658, nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Rev. Thomas Dimmockが1604年10月7日にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Edward Humphrey Dimmockは17歳，母Margaret Endersbyは15歳であった。1638年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルでAnnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1639年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウススシトゥアトに，1640年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルに住んでいた。彼は1658年6月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで53歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rev. Thomas Dimmock(이)가 1604년 10월 7일 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward Humphrey Dimmock(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Endersby(은)는 15세였다. 그는 1638년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 Ann(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1639년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 스시투앳에서, 1640년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일에서 살았다. 그는 1658년 6월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rev. Thomas Dimmock родился 7 октября 1604 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Edward Humphrey Dimmock было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Endersby, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann в 1638 г. в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности сситуэит, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1639 году и в местности барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1640 году. Он умер 4 июня 1658 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rev. Thomas Dimmock nació el 7 de octubre de 1604, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Edward Humphrey Dimmock, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Margaret Endersby, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Ann en 1638, en Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Scituate, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1639 y en Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1640. Murió el 4 de junio de 1658, en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
